# Top Tier Custom Floors

## About
Top Tier Custom Floors is a premium custom flooring installation company based in Valley Center, California. Founded by Stone Peters, the company specializes in hardwood flooring, herringbone and custom pattern flooring, metallic epoxy floors, polished concrete, stair installation, sand and refinish, and laminate/vinyl flooring.

## Service Area
San Diego County and North Orange County, California. Cities include Valley Center, Escondido, San Marcos, Oceanside, Carlsbad, Encinitas, Vista, Poway, Rancho Bernardo, Rancho Santa Fe, Del Mar, La Jolla, San Diego, Fallbrook, Temecula, San Clemente, Dana Point, Laguna Niguel, Mission Viejo, and Irvine.

## Contact
- Phone: (619) 385-4947
- Website: https://toptierfloors.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/top_tier_custom_floors/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/toptierfloors

## Services
- Hardwood Flooring Installation (solid and engineered)
- Herringbone and Custom Pattern Flooring (with brass and metal inlays)
- Metallic Epoxy Floors (garage, commercial, decorative)
- Polished Concrete
- Stair Installation (treads, risers, handrail matching)
- Sand and Refinish (restoration, refinishing, color changes)
- Laminate, LVP, and VCT Installation

## Brands
California Classics, Duchateau, Garrison Collection, Kahrs, Mohawk, American Sanders
